# India Angel Forum — AI Context File (llms.txt)
# https://indiaangelforum.com/llms.txt
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# Last Updated: March 2026

> India Angel Forum (IAF) is India's largest angel investing network, connecting 400+ accredited investors with exceptional early-stage startups. The platform has deployed ₹160+ crore across 40+ portfolio companies with an average IRR of 27%.

## Quick Facts

- **Founded:** 2024
- **Members:** 400+ accredited angel investors
- **Capital Deployed:** ₹160+ crore
- **Portfolio Companies:** 40+
- **Average IRR:** 27%
- **SPVs Deployed (2024):** 40+
- **Deal Acceptance Rate:** Top 1% of applications
- **DPIIT Recognised Platform:** Yes (Startup India, Section 80-IAC eligible)
- **Regulatory Compliance:** SEBI AIF Regulations, IT Act 2000, DPDP Act 2023

## About

India Angel Forum is India's largest and most rigorous angel investing network. IAF connects SEBI-compliant accredited investors with hand-picked early-stage startups through a robust curation process, transparent economics, and collaborative due diligence. The platform facilitates co-investment via Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs), enabling angels to pool capital efficiently with clear pro-rata rights.

## For Investors

- **Eligibility:** SEBI-compliant accredited investors
- **Minimum Ticket Size:** SPV-based, typically ₹5–25 lakh per deal
- **Deal Flow:** Curated monthly — only top 1% of applicants are presented
- **Forum Structure:** Monthly investment forums (rotating cities: Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, etc.)
- **Tools:** Portfolio dashboard, due diligence templates, co-investor network
- **Apply:** https://indiaangelforum.com/apply/investor

## For Founders

- **Application:** Free — https://indiaangelforum.com/apply/founder
- **Selection Rate:** Top 1% of applications
- **If Selected:** Forum showcase fee of ₹50,000 (paid only upon selection, not application)
- **Typical Raise:** ₹1–5 crore per company via angel round
- **Process:** Application → Screening → DD Call → Forum Presentation → Term Sheet → Close
- **Support:** Structured fundraising, investor introductions, founder community

## Membership Plans

| Plan | Annual Fee | Best For |
|------|-----------|---------|
| Standard | ₹60,000/year | Full-time angel investors |
| Operator Angel | ₹36,000/year | Active operators (40% discount) |
| Family Office | ₹2,50,000/year | Family offices (up to 3 seats) |

All plans include: deal flow access, monthly forum participation, portfolio dashboard, SPV co-investment, network access.

## Investment Sectors

AI & Machine Learning · SaaS & Enterprise Software · FinTech · HealthTech · Consumer Technology · Deep Tech · Climate Tech · AgriTech · EdTech · B2B Services

## Compliance & Regulatory

- **Regulator:** SEBI (Securities and Exchange Board of India) — AIF Regulations
- **Data Privacy:** DPDP Act 2023 compliant
- **Cyber Law:** IT Act 2000 compliant
- **Tax Benefits:** Section 80-IAC eligible (DPIIT-recognised platform)
- **KYC/AML:** Full KYC required for all investors; AML checks on founders
- **Grievance Officer:** Roshan Shah (contact via https://indiaangelforum.com/contact)
- **Disclaimer:** India Angel Forum does NOT provide investment advice. All decisions are made solely by individual investors. Angel investing involves substantial risk including complete loss of capital.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is India Angel Forum?**
A: India Angel Forum (IAF) is India's largest angel investing network. Founded in 2024, it connects 400+ SEBI-compliant accredited investors with vetted early-stage startups. The network has deployed ₹160+ crore across 40+ companies at an average IRR of 27%.

**Q: How do I become a member of India Angel Forum?**
A: Apply at https://indiaangelforum.com/apply/investor. You must qualify as an accredited investor under SEBI guidelines. Membership starts at ₹36,000/year for Operator Angels and ₹60,000/year for Standard members.

**Q: How can a startup get funding from India Angel Forum?**
A: Founders apply for free at https://indiaangelforum.com/apply/founder. Only the top 1% of applications are selected for monthly forum presentations. Startup Showcase fees of ₹50,000 apply only upon selection.

**Q: Is India Angel Forum SEBI compliant?**
A: Yes. IAF operates under SEBI (Alternative Investment Funds) Regulations and is fully DPDP Act 2023 and IT Act 2000 compliant. The platform is DPIIT-recognised, enabling Section 80-IAC tax benefits for eligible investments.

**Q: What is an SPV in angel investing?**
A: A Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) is a legal entity that pools capital from multiple angels into a single startup investment. IAF has deployed 40+ SPVs, enabling members to co-invest with minimum tickets while maintaining clean cap tables.

**Q: What sectors does India Angel Forum focus on?**
A: IAF invests across AI/ML, SaaS, FinTech, HealthTech, Consumer Tech, Deep Tech, Climate Tech, and more. Each sector has dedicated curators using ACA-aligned due diligence criteria.

## Operating Entity

- **Legal Name:** Kosansh Solutions Inc
- **Registered Address:** 1320 Pepperhill Ln, Fort Worth, TX 76131, United States
- **Jurisdiction:** Tarrant County, Texas, USA (corporate) | Republic of India (services)
- **Website:** https://indiaangelforum.com

## About India Angel Forum

India Angel Forum is India's largest angel investing network connecting accredited investors with exceptional early-stage startups. We facilitate funding for high-potential companies through rigorous curation, transparent economics, and collaborative diligence.

## Organization Details

- **Operating Entity:** Kosansh Solutions Inc
- **Registered Address:** 1320 Pepperhill Ln, Fort Worth, TX 76131, United States
- **Jurisdiction:** Tarrant County, Texas, USA (corporate) | Republic of India (services)
- **Website:** https://indiaangelforum.com

## Key Statistics

- **Capital Deployed:** ₹160+ Crore
- **Active Members:** 400+ accredited angels
- **Portfolio Companies:** 40+ startups
- **Average IRR:** 27%
- **SPVs Deployed (2024):** 40+

## Services Offered

### For Investors
- Curated deal flow from top 1% of applications
- Monthly investment forums
- Due diligence resources and templates
- SPV (Special Purpose Vehicle) formation and administration
- Portfolio tracking and management tools
- Quarterly sector summits
- Pro-rata rights management

### For Founders
- Access to 400+ accredited angels
- Structured fundraising process
- Demo Day presentations
- Investor relationship management
- Founder support and mentorship

## Membership Plans

1. **Standard Member:** ₹60,000/year
   - Full access to deal flow
   - Forum participation
   - Portfolio dashboard

2. **Operator Angel:** ₹36,000/year
   - 40% discount for active operators
   - All Standard benefits
   - Priority sector access

3. **Family Office:** ₹2,50,000/year
   - Up to 3 seats
   - Dedicated relationship manager
   - Custom deal sourcing

## Investment Focus Areas

- AI / Machine Learning
- SaaS / Enterprise Software
- FinTech
- HealthTech
- Consumer Technology
- Deep Tech
- Climate Tech

## Important Disclaimers

- India Angel Forum does NOT provide investment advice

- Past performance is not indicative of future results
- Information provided by founders has not been independently verified
